commands.name: auth-status
commands.description: Show current authentication status.

commands.name: azdo artifacts
commands.description: List artifacts produced by a build.

options.name: --pattern
options.description: Filter artifacts by name using glob-style matching. [Default: @"*"]

options.name: --top
options.description: Maximum number of artifacts to return (default 100). [Default: 100]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

commands.name: azdo auth-status
commands.description: Show the currently resolved Azure DevOps authentication path without making an AzDO API request.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.

commands.name: azdo build
commands.description: Get details of a specific Azure DevOps build.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

commands.name: azdo builds
commands.description: List recent builds for an Azure DevOps project.

options.name: --org
options.description: Azure DevOps organization (default: dnceng-public). [Default: @"dnceng-public"]

options.name: --project
options.description: Azure DevOps project (default: public). [Default: @"public"]

options.name: --top
options.description: Maximum number of builds to return (default 20). [Default: 20]

options.name: --branch
options.description: Filter by branch name. [Default: null]

options.name: --pr-number
options.description: Filter by pull request number. [Default: null]

options.name: --definition-id
options.description: Filter by pipeline definition ID. [Default: null]

options.name: --status
options.description: Filter by build status. [Default: null]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

commands.name: azdo changes
commands.description: Get the commits/changes associated with a build.

options.name: --top
options.description: Maximum number of changes to return. [Default: 20]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

commands.name: azdo log
commands.description: Get log content for a specific build log.

options.name: --tail-lines
options.description: Number of lines from the end to return. [Default: 500]

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

arguments.name: 1] <INT
arguments.description: Log ID from the timeline record's log reference.

commands.name: azdo search-log
commands.description: Search one build log or all ranked build logs for a pattern.

options.name: --pattern
options.description: Text pattern to search for (case-insensitive). [Default: @"error"]

options.name: --context-lines
options.description: Lines of context before and after each match. [Default: 2]

options.name: --max-matches
options.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default 100). [Default: 100]

options.name: --log-id
options.description: Log ID from the timeline record's log reference. Omit to search all ranked logs. [Default: null]

options.name: --max-logs
options.description: Maximum number of log steps to download and search (default 50). [Default: 50]

options.name: --min-lines
options.description: Minimum line count to include a log in the search. [Default: 5]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

commands.name: azdo search-timeline
commands.description: Search build timeline for records matching a pattern.

options.name: --type
options.description: Filter by record type: Stage, Job, or Task. [Default: null]

options.name: --result
options.description: Result filter: 'failed' (default — includes non-succeeded records or records with timeline issues, same as 'azdo timeline') or 'all'. [Default: @"failed"]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING
arguments.description: Text pattern to search for in record names and issue messages (case-insensitive).

commands.name: azdo test-attachments
commands.description: List attachments for a specific test result.

options.name: --org
options.description: Azure DevOps organization (default: dnceng-public). [Default: @"dnceng-public"]

options.name: --project
options.description: Azure DevOps project (default: public). [Default: @"public"]

options.name: --top
options.description: Maximum number of attachments to return (default 100). [Default: 100]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <INT
arguments.description: Test run ID from azdo-test-runs output.

arguments.name: 1] <INT
arguments.description: Test result ID from azdo-test-results output.

commands.name: azdo test-results
commands.description: Get test results for a specific test run.

options.name: --top
options.description: Maximum number of test results to return. [Default: 200]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID or URL — used to resolve org/project context.

arguments.name: 1] <INT
arguments.description: Test run ID from azdo-test-runs output.

commands.name: azdo test-runs
commands.description: List test runs for a build.

options.name: --top
options.description: Maximum number of test runs to return. [Default: 50]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

commands.name: azdo timeline
commands.description: Get the build timeline showing stages, jobs, and tasks.

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter: 'failed' (default) or 'all'. [Default: @"failed"]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: AzDO build ID (integer) or full AzDO build URL.

commands.name: batch-status
commands.description: Get status for multiple Helix jobs at once.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING[
arguments.description: One or more Helix job IDs or URLs.

commands.name: cache clear
commands.description: Clear all cached data across ALL auth contexts.

commands.name: cache status
commands.description: Show cache size, entry count, oldest/newest entries for the current auth context.

commands.name: download
commands.description: Download work item files or a direct URL.

options.name: --pattern
options.description: File name or glob pattern (e.g., *.binlog). [Default: @"*"]

options.name: --url
options.description: Direct file URL to download (bypasses jobId/workItem). [Default: null]

arguments.name: 0] <STRING?
arguments.description: Helix job ID or URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING?
arguments.description: Work item name.

commands.name: files
commands.description: List uploaded files for a work item.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: Helix job ID or URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING
arguments.description: Work item name.

commands.name: find-files
commands.description: Scan work items in a job to find files matching a pattern.

options.name: --pattern
options.description: File name or glob pattern (e.g., *.binlog, *.trx, *.dmp). [Default: @"*"]

options.name: --max-items
options.description: Max work items to scan (default 50). [Default: 50]

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: Helix job ID or URL.

commands.name: llms-txt
commands.description: Print comprehensive tool documentation for LLM agents.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Authenticate with helix.dot.net by storing an API token.

options.name: --no-browser
options.description: Skip opening the browser.

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Remove stored Helix authentication token.

commands.name: logs
commands.description: Download console log for a work item to a temp file.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: Helix job ID or URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING
arguments.description: Work item name.

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Start the MCP server over stdio for use with MCP clients (VS Code, Claude Desktop, etc.).

commands.name: parse-uploaded-trx
commands.description: Parse TRX/xUnit XML test result files uploaded to Helix blob storage.

options.name: --file-name
options.description: Specific TRX file name (optional - auto-discovers all .trx files if not set). [Default: null]

options.name: --include-passed
options.description: Include passed tests in output (default: false).

options.name: --max-results
options.description: Maximum number of test results to return (default: 200). [Default: 200]

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: Helix job ID or URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING
arguments.description: Work item name.

commands.name: search-log
commands.description: Search a work item's console log or uploaded file for a pattern.

options.name: --context
options.description: Number of context lines before and after each match. [Default: 2]

options.name: --max-matches
options.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default 100). [Default: 100]

options.name: --file-name
options.description: File name to search (omit for console log). [Default: null]

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: Helix job ID or URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING
arguments.description: Work item name.

arguments.name: 2] <STRING
arguments.description: Text pattern to search for (case-insensitive substring match).

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show work item summary for a Helix job.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: Helix job ID (GUID) or full Helix URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING
arguments.description: Filter: 'failed' (default), 'passed', or 'all'.

commands.name: work-item
commands.description: Show detailed info about a specific work item.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as structured JSON instead of human-readable text.

arguments.name: 0] <STRING
arguments.description: Helix job ID (GUID) or full Helix URL.

arguments.name: 1] <STRING
arguments.description: Work item name.
